headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Synopsys (SNPS): Should You Buy?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Synopsys (SNPS) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
summary: Synopsys (SNPS) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.
